property.name: quarkus.http.port
property.description: HTTP port for the Polaris server.

property.name: polaris.authentication.type
property.description: Authentication mode: internal, external, or mixed.

property.name: polaris.authentication.authenticator.type
property.description: Authenticator implementation for Polaris.

property.name: polaris.authentication.active-roles-provider.type
property.description: Active roles provider implementation for Polaris.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-service.type
property.description: Token service implementation for internal authentication.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.type
property.description: Token broker implementation (rsa-key-pair or symmetric-key).

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.max-token-generation
property.description: Maximum token lifetime in ISO-8601 duration format (e.g. PT1H).

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.rsa-key-pair.public-key-file
property.description: Public key file for RSA token broker.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.rsa-key-pair.private-key-file
property.description: Private key file for RSA token broker.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.symmetric-key.file
property.description: Shared secret file for symmetric token broker.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.symmetric-key.secret
property.description: Optional shared secret for symmetric token broker.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.realms
property.description: Comma-separated list of Polaris realms.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.header-name
property.description: HTTP header used to resolve the realm.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.require-header
property.description: Require the realm header for all requests.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.tenant-enabled
property.description: Enable the default OIDC tenant when using external authentication.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.auth-server-url
property.description: OIDC issuer base URL for the default tenant.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.client-id
property.description: OIDC client id for Polaris.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.credentials.secret
property.description: OIDC client secret for Polaris.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.application-type
property.description: Quarkus OIDC application type.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.roles.role-claim-path
property.description: JWT claim path used by Quarkus to read roles.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.type
property.description: Principal mapper implementation.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.id-claim-path
property.description: JWT claim path for the principal id.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.name-claim-path
property.description: JWT claim path for the principal name.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.type
property.description: Principal roles mapper implementation.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.filter
property.description: Regex filter applied to roles before mapping.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.mappings[0].regex
property.description: Regex for mapping role names.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.mappings[0].replacement
property.description: Replacement for mapped role names.
